business.name: Jones Septic Service
business.tagline: When you need it pumped, we show up

hero.headline: The septic pros *Hagerstown trusts*
hero.subheadline: Fair prices, clean work, and we answer after hours when emergencies hit.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Everything septic, handled right
services_section.subheading: From routine pumping to emergency calls — we've got the equipment and experience

services.title: Septic Tank Pumping
services.description: Regular maintenance pumping to keep your system running smooth. We pump it clean and check for issues while we're there.

services.title: Emergency Service
services.description: When your system backs up or overflows, we squeeze you into our schedule fast. Available after hours for urgent calls.

services.title: System Inspections
services.description: We spot problems before they become disasters. Visual inspection of your tank, lines, and drain field.

services.title: Drain Field Repair
services.description: When your drain field isn't draining right, we diagnose the problem and fix it properly the first time.

about.heading: Family business serving Hagerstown
about.body: We're the Jones family — Doug handles the pumping, Brenda takes your calls. Real people, fair prices, clean work every time.

reviews.name: Terry C.
reviews.text: Called them Friday, they were here Saturday morning. Clean, efficient work at a fair price.

reviews.name: Kyle J.
reviews.text: Fantastic family business. Reached them after hours and they squeezed me in the next morning for emergency work.

reviews.name: Tiffany W.
reviews.text: The Jones family squeezed me in for an emergency and got there early. Brenda was sweet, Doug was kind and reasonably priced.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Hagerstown and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Fast response times throughout Washington County

cta.heading: Need your septic tank pumped?
cta.body: Don't wait until it backs up. Call the Jones family for honest service and fair pricing.
